data.biography: Elvis Tsui Kam-Kong, also known as 徐錦江, is a Chinese actor based in Hong Kong. He is primarily known for his roles in erotic films and martial arts films, where he's more often cast as villains.
data.name: Elvis Tsui Kam-Kong

data.biography: 徐锦江（Elvis Tsui）出生于黑龙江，毕业于广州美术学院，主修绘画，美术大师关山月的关门弟子，1982年到港发展，曾举行画展，亦从事过模特和夜总会歌手。1987年正式踏入电影圈，在八十年代到香港后被麦当雄导演赏识，以《省港旗兵续集》入行，后来曾经拍摄过多部三级片。他因在周星驰电影中的演出而被许多观众熟悉，现在在内地发展，以拍摄电视剧为主。
data.name: 徐锦江

data.biography: 徐錦江（英語：Elvis Tsui Kam Kong，1961年10月13日－），出生於黑龍江省牡丹江市，是香港男演員及畫家，也擅長藝術創作，畢業於廣州美術學院，師承已故嶺南畫派國畫大師關山月。
data.name: 徐錦江

data.biography: Từ Cẩm Giang là một nam diễn viên người Trung Quốc hoạt động tại Hồng Kông. Bắt đầu nổi tiếng với thể loại phim cấp ba hồi thập niên 1990, cho đến nay anh là một diễn viên gạo cội của điện ảnh Hồng Kông với nhiều vai diễn phụ đặc sắc, đặc biệt là những vai phản diện.
data.name: Từ Cẩm Giang

data.biography:
徐錦江，香港男演員及畫家，也擅長藝術創作，畢業於廣州美術學院，師承已故嶺南畫派國畫大師關山月。

徐錦江在 1981 年來到香港發展，初期曾開個人畫展，但其作品不獲香港人注意。他也曾於入行前當過模特兒和夜總會歌手。1981 年考入第 10 期無綫電視藝員訓練班，著名的同期同學有劉德華、吳家麗、梁家輝、戚美珍、張之亮、黃耀明等，1983 年正式踏入電影圈。由於外型較剛強且兇悍，徐多數飾演反派，如《省港旗兵 2》中之李向東、《省港旗兵 3》中之毛向陽。曾演出三級片，例如在《色情男女》中的飾演一位性無能的三級片演員，使他第二次獲得 1997 年最佳男配角提名。此前於 1994 年，亦憑《水滸傳之英雄本色》魯智深一角首次獲得香港電影金像獎最佳男配角提名。而他曾有十年時間患上抑鬱症。由於拍攝了不少三級電影和一本寫真集《形神集》，令徐錦江與母親和胞妹的關係轉差。他之所以會拍攝三級作品是因為他認為演員應該要有多面性，不只侷限在一個方面演出。
data.name: 徐錦江

data.biography:
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

James A. Westerfield (22 March 1913 – 20 September 1971) was an American actor of stage, film, and television.

Born in Nashville, Tennessee, to candy-maker Brasher Omier Westerfield and his wife Dora Elizabeth Bailey, he was raised in Detroit, Michigan. (A news story in the June 12, 1949, issue of The Brooklyn Daily Eagle calls the information in the preceding sentence into question. It describes Westerfield as "the son of a famous producer-director" and says that he was "a youngster in Denver, Col.")

He became interested in theatre as a young man and in the 1930s joined Gilmor Brown's famed Pasadena Community Playhouse, appearing in dozens of plays. He played in numerous films following his debut in 1940, then went to New York City and appeared on Broadway, winning two New York Drama Critics' Circle Awards for his supporting roles in The Madwoman of Chaillot and Detective Story. He then returned to Hollywood and made more than 40 more films. Westerfield maintained an interest in the theatre. He directed more than 50 musicals in a summer-musical tent he owned in Danbury, Connecticut, and was the original stage director and producer for the Greek Theatre in Los Angeles. He directed three seasons of "Theatre Under the Stars" in Vancouver, British Columbia, and appeared in musical roles with the Detroit Civic Light Opera, the Los Angeles Civic Light Opera, and the San Francisco Civic Light Opera.

On film, Westerfield had roles in The Magnificent Ambersons (1942), On The Waterfront (1954), Lucy Gallant (1955), the 1957 Budd Boetticher-directed Western Decision at Sundown starring Randolph Scott, Cowboy (1958), a repeating role in The Absent-Minded Professor (1961) and its sequel Son of Flubber (1963), Birdman of Alcatraz (1962), Man's Favorite Sport (1964), The Sons of Katie Elder (1965), Hang 'Em High (1968) and True Grit (1969).

Westerfield had many roles on television, including seven episodes as John Murrel from 1963 to 1964 on ABC's The Travels of Jaimie McPheeters, starring child actor Kurt Russell in the title role. He made two guest appearances on Perry Mason, including the role of Sheriff Bert Elmore in the 1957 episode, "The Case of the Angry Mourner." He also appeared in an episode of The Lone Ranger in 1954 entitled "Texas Draw."

Westerfield's other appearances were on such series as The Rifleman, The Californians, Richard Diamond, Private Detective, The Alaskans, The Rebel, Straightaway, Going My Way, The Asphalt Jungle, Hazel, The Andy Griffith Show, Daniel Boone, The Beverly Hillbillies, and Gunsmoke. He played the circus leader, Dr. Marvello, in an episode of Lost in Space "Space Circus" (1966).

Westerfield as a young man was a roommate of fellow Pasadena Playhouse actor George Reeves. The two remained close friends until Reeves's death in 1959.

Westerfield was married to Alice G. Fay (an actress under the name Fay Tracey), who, along with his mother, survived him. Westerfield died from a heart attack in Woodlands Hills, California, at the age of fifty-eight.
data.name: James Westerfield

data.biography:
James Westerfield (* 22. März 1913 in Nashville, Tennessee; † 20. September 1971 in Los Angeles, Kalifornien) war ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

Leben und Karriere

James Westerfield machte sein Filmdebüt 1940 mit einer kleinen Rolle als Hinterwäldler im Historiendrama The Howards of Virginia, nachdem er zuvor bereits Erfahrungen als Theaterschauspieler am Pasadena Playhouse gesammelt hatte. Obwohl er bereits im folgenden Jahr erstmals eine Erwähnung im Abspann für Highway West erhielt, blieben die Rollen für den schwergewichtigen, schon früh zur Glatze neigenden Charakterschauspieler zunächst klein. Ein Höhepunkt seiner frühen Filmkarriere war die Darstellung des Butlers im Film noir The Chase (1946). Im Dezember 1944 gab Westerfield sein Broadway-Debüt in der Musikkomödie Sing Out, Sweet Land; in den folgenden zehn Jahren arbeitete er hauptsächlich beim Theater in New York und verschaffte sich Anerkennung, teilweise auch mit selbstgeschriebenen und selbstproduzierten Stücken. Er wurde zweimal mit dem renommierten New York Drama Critics Award ausgezeichnet.

Eine erfolgreiche Rückkehr nach Hollywood schaffte er 1954 mit der Darstellung des bulligen Hafenarbeiters Big Mac in Elia Kazans Filmklassiker Die Faust im Nacken. Sechs Jahre später sollte er nochmals unter Regie von Kazan in Wilder Strom spielen. Bis zu seinem Tod folgten zahlreiche Nebenrollen für Westerfield, vor allem in Western oder Kriminalfilmen, in denen er meist bodenständige Arbeiter oder raue Verbrecher verkörperte. In den Disney-Komödien Der unheimliche Zotti (1959), Der fliegende Pauker (1961) und Der Pauker kann’s nicht lassen (1962) trat er jeweils als Polizist auf. Weitere Auftritte hatte er neben Rock Hudson in Howard Hawks' Komödie Ein Goldfisch an der Leine (1964) sowie in einer historischen Rolle als Richter Isaac Charles Parker in Henry Hathaways Western Der Marshal (1969) an der Seite von John Wayne. Regelmäßig übernahm Westerfield auch Gastrollen in Fernsehserien wie Bonanza, Rauchende Colts, Die Leute von der Shiloh Ranch und Verliebt in eine Hexe. Sein letzter Film Lucky Johnny erschien posthum erst im Jahre 1975.
James A. Westerfield (Nashville, Tennessee, 22 de març de 1913 - Woodland Hills, Los Angeles, 20 de setembre de 1971) va ser un actor de personatges d'escenari, cinema i televisió nord-americà.

data.name: Ánh Sáng Thiên Thư
data.overview: Chàng trai trẻ Hoa Phù Sinh không màng chuyện đời, chỉ đam mê y học. Phương pháp hành nghề độc đáo khiến dân chúng trong thành vừa yêu mến vừa sợ hãi. Sau cái chết của Bách Y, Hoa Phù Sinh bị hiểu nhầm là hung thủ. Những manh mối trong bức di thư mà sư phụ để lại dường như hướng về bức "Thiên Thư" thần bí. Tình cờ, Văn Giác, con gái thành chủ Lương Châu, và Cố Thiên, người kế thừa tạp kỹ, cũng bị cuốn vào. Cả ba cùng nhau đến Lương Châu để điều tra. Văn Giác mượn thế lực của thành chủ giúp Phù Sinh mở một y quán ở Lương Châu, còn Cố Thiên lanh lợi hỗ trợ thu thập thông tin. Hoa Phù Sinh ở Lương Châu chữa bệnh cho dân nghèo đồng thời tìm kiếm sự thật. Tuy nhiên, những chuyện kỳ bí liên tiếp xảy ra, khiến câu đố càng trở nên phức tạp. Hoa Phù Sinh không hề hay biết rằng sự xuất hiện của mình đã âm thầm tạo ra một đợt sóng ngầm ở Lương Châu.

data.biography:
Jack Alexander Huston (born 7 December 1982) is an English actor and director. He appeared as Richard Harrow in the HBO television drama series Boardwalk Empire. He also had a supporting role in the 2013 film American Hustle, portrayed the eponymous Ben-Hur in the 2016 historical drama, and appeared as one of the main characters in the fourth season of the FX anthology series Fargo (2020). In 2023, he starred in the supernatural television series Mayfair Witches.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Jack Huston, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Jack Huston

data.biography:
Nascimento: 7 de Dezembro de 1982 (36 years)

Londres - Reino Unido da Grã-Bretanha e Irlanda do Norte

Jack Huston Alexander (nascido em 7 de dezembro de 1982) é um ator Inglês. Huston tem um papel protagonista em "Neighborhood Watch" e filmou Outlander(2008) com James Caviezel e Sophia Myles . Ele participou do terceiro filme da série Crepúsculo, The Twilight Saga: Eclipse, interpretando Royce King II um filho rico de um banqueiro, foi noivo de Rosalie Hale antes dela tornar-se vampira.

Huston nasceu em Londres, Inglaterra, filho de Lady Margot Lavinia Cholmondeley Anthony e Walter Huston. Seu avô paterno era o diretor John Huston e seu avô materno era Hugh Cholmondeley, 6.º Marquês de Cholmondeley; entre os antepassados de sua mãe, incluem-se David Sassoon, o tesoureiro de Bagdá, Mayer Amschel Rothschild, que fundou a Família Rothschild dinastia de banqueiros internacionais, e Robert Walpole, primeiro-ministro da Grã-Bretanha de 1721 até 1742. Huston é sobrinho dos atores Anjelica Huston e Danny Huston. Atualmente namora a apresentadora de TV inglesa Cat Deeley.

Jack Huston porte un patronyme très célèbre transmis par sa famille, grande lignée d’artistes, acteurs, réalisateurs. En effet, Jack est le petit-fils du célèbre cinéaste John Huston et le neveu des comédiens Danny et Anjelica Huston.

C’est donc naturellement que le britannique se passionne très tôt pour le théâtre et la comédie. Dès l’âge de six ans, Jack décide qu’il sera un acteur après avoir incarné le rôle principal de Peter Pan pour un spectacle d’école.

Le comédien alterne les genres en jouant les seconds rôles dans des longs-métrages tels que Le choix de Jane aux côtés d’Olivia Williams, Boogie Woogie avec Stellan Skarsgard ou la comédie Le Psy d’Hollywood où il donne la réplique à Kevin Spacey.

En 2010, la carrière de Huston prend un tournant. Son visage est d’abord reconnu par les midinettes du monde entier. En effet, l’artiste prête ses traits au personnage de Royce King dans le troisième opus de la saga pour adolescents à succès, Twilight – Chapitre 3 : Hésitation. La même année, le comédien fait un virage à 360 degrés en intégrant le prestigieux casting de la série TV créée par Martin Scorsese, Boardwalk Empire.

Jack Huston interprète le rôle du taiseux et implacable Richard Harrow, vétéran de la première guerre mondiale défiguré reconverti en homme de main pour la pègre d’Atlantic City. Pour ce rôle, l’acteur doit porter un masque cachant la moitié de son visage, adopter la voix et les mimiques d’un personnage profond et torturé, traumatisé par la guerre. Une performance remarquable et saluée. Jack incarne Harrow pendant 4 saisons tout en continuant à tourner pour le cinéma.

En 2012, le natif de Londres fait jeu égal avec le grand James Gandolfini dans Not Fade Away, l’histoire de la formation d’un groupe de rock dans le New-Jersey des années 60. Le film est mis en scène par David Chase, créateur des Soprano. L’année suivante, Jack incarne le célèbre écrivain de la beat generation Jack Kerouac dans le biopic Kill Your Darlings et donne la réplique à Daniel Radcliffe et Dane DeHaan. Il rejoint également le prestigieux casting d’American Bluff de David O. Russell et se mesure à Christian Bale et Bradley Cooper.

La carrière cinématographique du britannique prend de plus en plus d’ampleur dès l’année 2015. Après la comédie romantique adaptée d’un roman de Nicholas Sparks, The Longest Ride, il combat des zombies dans Pride and Prejudices and Zombies. L’acteur remplace également au pied levé Luke Evans dans le rôle principal de la nouvelle version de The Crow, remake du film du même nom où le héros revient d’entre les morts pour venger la mort de sa femme. Le comédien quitte malheureusement le projet quelques semaines avant le début du tournage. Il reste toutefois sur le thème de la vengeance en 2016 avec la sortie de Ben-Hur, nouvelle adaptation du roman de Lew Wallace et remake du célèbre film avec Charlton Heston. Huston y interprète le rôle-titre de ce survivant de l’esclavage revenu assouvir sa soif de vengeance.

data.name: ジャック・ヒューストン

data.biography: 杰克·亚历山大·休斯顿（Jack Alexander Huston，1982年12月7日-），英裔美国演员。杰克·休斯顿出生于一个拥有丰富演艺遗产的家庭，包括他的祖父约翰·休斯顿和阿姨安杰丽卡·休斯顿，杰克·休斯顿在娱乐圈声名鹊起。休斯顿在《邻里守望》中担任主演，并与詹姆斯·卡维泽尔和索菲亚·迈尔斯一起拍摄了《欧蓝德》（2008 年）。他出现在《暮光之城》系列的第三部电影《日食》中，在那里他扮演了罗伊斯·金二世。休斯顿因在 HBO 的“浮桥帝国”中饰演理查德·哈罗而获得认可，理查德·哈罗是一名伤痕累累的第一次世界大战神枪手，后来成为黑帮。休斯顿对这位毁容的第一次世界大战老兵的刻画获得了评论界的赞誉，并展示了他的表演范围。休斯顿在第一季的五集中出现后将成为系列的常客。此后，他出现在各种电影和电视节目中，展示了他作为不同类型演员的才华和多才多艺。休斯顿继续以其引人入胜的表演和对手艺的奉献精神给观众留下深刻印象。
data.name: 杰克·休斯頓

data.biography: 傑克·亞歷山大·休斯頓（Jack Alexander Huston，1982 年 12 月 7 日-），英裔美國演員。傑克·休斯頓出生於一個擁有豐富演藝遺產的家庭，包括他的祖父約翰·休斯頓和阿姨安傑麗卡·休斯頓，傑克·休斯頓在娛樂圈聲名鵲起。休斯頓在《鄰裏守望》中擔任主演，並與詹姆斯·卡維澤爾和索菲亞·邁爾斯一起拍攝了《歐藍德》（2008 年）。他出現在《吸血新世紀》系列的第三部電影《日食》中，在那裏他扮演了羅伊斯·金二世。休斯頓因在 HBO 的“浮橋帝國”中飾演理查德·哈羅而獲得認可，理查德·哈羅是一名傷痕累累的第一次世界大戰神槍手，後來成為黑幫。休斯頓對這位毀容的第一次世界大戰老兵的刻畫獲得了評論界的讚譽，並展示了他的表演範圍。休斯頓在第一季的五集中出現後將成為系列的常客。此後，他出現在各種電影和電視節目中，展示了他作為不同類型演員的才華和多才多藝。休斯頓繼續以其引人入勝的表演和對手藝的奉獻精神給觀眾留下深刻印象。
data.name: 傑克·休斯頓

data.biography:
Guillermo 'Memo' Villegas Román (Metepec, Estado de México, 25 de junio de 1987), es un actor, presentador, actor de doblaje y comediante mexicano.  En su infancia, aspiraba a ser futbolista, pero mientras se encontraba en sexto grado de primaria, actuó en la obra de teatro escolar de La bella y la bestia, y se interesó por la actuación. Posteriormente, durante el transcurso de su educación secundaria y preparatoria, comenzó a asistir a diversos talleres de teatro.  En 2006, tuvo su primera oportunidad como actor participando con un papel secundario en una película de bajo presupuesto titulada, Jugando con la muerte. Un año después, en 2007, se adentró a estudiar una licenciatura en actuación, en la Escuela Nacional de Arte Teatral (ENAT), perteneciente al Instituto Nacional de Bellas Artes (INBA). Ese mismo año, inició su carrera como actor profesional, y en 2009 obtuvo su primer papel importante en una película, protagonizando Rabioso sol, rabioso cielo.

Su filmografía prosiguió interviniendo en cortometrajes y en cintas, en las que apareció con papeles de reparto, como Sucedió en un día (2010), No eres tú, soy yo (2010), Días de gracia (2011), Hacia Asia (2012), Carmín Tropical (2014), y El elegido (2016). En 2017, debutó en televisión apareciendo en el episodio «Hansel y Gretel» de la serie Érase una vez, producida por Televisa.

Luego de intervenir en las series Narcos: México, en 2018, y La bandida, en 2019, fue en este último año en que Villegas se dio a conocer mediáticamente gracias a un sketch que realizó para la serie Backdoor, en el que interpretó a un policía que termina intoxicado al probar un narcótico, para según él, convencer a sus compañeros de que era harina. Dicha personificación se hizo viral en redes sociales, lo que le permitió obtener exposición como actor luego de haber luchado por varios años con encontrar más trabajo en otros medios.

En 2020, trabajó para Netflix, personificando al político mexicano Luis Miranda Nava en la miniserie Historia de un crimen: La búsqueda, basada en el caso policíaco de Paulette Gebara.​ De su papel con Backdoor, en 2022, en colaboración con Comedy Central y Prime Video, se lanzó la serie  'Harina', en la que Villegas protagonizó como el «Teniente Edson Prieto», apodado como el «Teniente Harina», el mismo rol del sketch que le dio cobertura mediática. La primera temporada fue lanzada el 10 de marzo de 2022,​ y el 11 de octubre de2023, la segunda.​ También en 2023, Villegas fue protagonista de las películas, El último vagón​ y La gran seducción,​ y actor secundario en la serie Ojitos de Huevo; asimismo, estelarizó las cintas, Nada que ver y Sobreviviendo Mis XV,​ y las producciones de Prime Video, Casando a mi ex​ y Divina señal.​

El 24 de mayo de 2024, debutó como actor de doblaje luego de prestar su voz para doblar al español latino al personaje del gato Garfield en The Garfield Movie, una película animada estadounidense. El 3 de julio, en la primera entrega de los Premios Aura, se le otorgó uno en la categoría a mejor actuación de comedia por su trabajo en la segunda temporada de Harina.​ El mismo año, protagonizó la cinta de comedia deportiva, V de Víctor, y la serie de comedia familiar, Profe Infiltrado. Junto a Regina Blandón, protagonizó la serie de Sony 'Enloqueciendo contigo' (2025) y fungió como presentador en 'Santas garnachas' de Netflix 2025.
data.name: Memo Villegas

data.biography: Christopher Jerell Redd is an American comedian and actor. He was a cast member of Saturday Night Live from 2017 to 2022. For his work on the show, he won a Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Original Music and Lyrics in 2018 for co-writing the SNL song "Come Back Barack".
data.name: Chris Redd
คริส เรดด์

data.biography: 李宇皓，演员，毕业于湖北工程学院文学与新闻传播学院。2019年，参演的电视剧《破冰行动》播出，在剧中饰演伍仔。2020年，参演电视剧《大神猴》。2022年9月，参演电视剧《狐妖小红娘 月红篇》。其他作品有《恶毒女配的甜蜜反击》。
data.name: 李宇皓

data.biography: 李宇皓，演員，畢業於湖北工程學院文學與新聞傳播學院。2019 年，參演的電視劇《破冰行動》播出，在劇中飾演伍仔。2020 年，參演電視劇《大神猴》。2022 年 9 月，參演電視劇《狐妖小紅娘 月紅篇》。其他作品有《惡毒女配的甜蜜反擊》。
data.name: 李宇皓

data.biography:
Dan Li is a British South East Asian actor born and raised in London. Throughout his career, he has built an impressive filmography that spans across genres and platforms.

He has been involved in several award-winning productions: working on the BAFTA award-winning Best British Film I Daniel Blake, the BAFTA children's award winner Horrible Histories, and the Best International Film Luther: The Fallen Sun.
data.name: Dan Li

data.biography:
Robert Upshur Woodward (born March 26, 1943) is an American investigative journalist. He started working for The Washington Post as a reporter in 1971 and now holds the title of associate editor.

While a young reporter for The Washington Post in 1972, Woodward teamed up with Carl Bernstein, and the two did much of the original news reporting on the Watergate scandal. These scandals led to numerous government investigations and the eventual resignation of President Richard Nixon. The work of Woodward and Bernstein was called "maybe the single greatest reporting effort of all time" by longtime journalism figure Gene Roberts.

Woodward continued to work for The Washington Post after his reporting on Watergate. He has written 21 books on American politics and current affairs, 13 of which have topped best-seller lists.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Bob Woodward, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Bob Woodward

data.biography: Lee Chae-min is a South Korean actor. He attended Korea National University of Arts and first made his debut as an actor in 2021.
data.name: Lee Chae-min

data.biography: 韓國男演員、主持人，出生於2000年9月15日。 他於2021年出道，因演出《浪漫速成班》、《名校的階梯》、《今生也請多指教》等作品累積知名度，並在2024年主演NETFLIX劇集《名校的階梯》。 他以190公分的高挑身材和精緻五官被封為「小宋江」，同時也是KBS音樂節目《音樂銀行》的固定主持人，並擅長鋼琴和籃球等才藝。
data.name: 李彩玟

data.biography: Lee Chae Min é um ator e apresentador de TV sul-coreano que nasceu em 15 de setembro de 2000. Ele estudou na Korea National University of Arts e fez sua estreia como ator na série dramática "High Class" em 2021, e seguiu com um papel na série "Love All Play" em 2022. Também em 2022, ele começou a coapresentar o programa musical "Music Bank K-Chart".
data.name: Lee Chae Min

data.biography: 2000 年 9 月 15 日出生於韓國，韓國男演員。2020 年 9 月 15 日 Goldmedalist 透過官網公佈了與李彩玟簽訂專屬合約。
data.name: 李彩玟
Thánh Phồng Tôm
data.overview:
Câu chuyện diễn ra tại thành phố Z của Nhật Bản tại thời điểm thế giới đầy những quái vật bí ẩn với sức mạnh ghê gớm đã xuất hiện và gây ra biết bao nhiêu thảm họa.  Nhưng cũng chính tại đây xuất hiện 1 siêu anh hùng đấm phát chết luôn, có thể dễ dàng đánh bại và tiêu diệt những con quái vật này. Cũng chính vì tài năng hiếm có này mà có rất nhiều nghi ngại về khả năng thực sự của vị siêu anh hùng, thậm chí anh không bao giờ nhận được bất kỳ lòng tin nào từ dân chúng.

Siêu anh hùng mạnh nhất thế giới có thể giết bất cứ ai chỉ với một đòn. Nhưng không có gì có thể thách thức anh ta, nên anh ta phải vật lộn với sự buồn chán và trầm cảm.

seasons.name: Kẻ Mạnh Nhất vs Kẻ Đáng Sợ Nhất

data.biography: Hamish Allan-Headley is an actor, known for Thinly Veiled (2009), Unidentified Objects and Warriors of Virtue (1997).
data.name: Hamish Allan-Headley
哈米什·艾倫 - 海德利

data.biography:
Kim Ki-bum (김기범; born September 23, 1991), known professionally as Key (키), is a South Korean singer-songwriter, dancer, actor, fashion designer and television presenter under SM Entertainment. He is a member of the South Korean boy group SHINee.

Aside from group activities, as a singer, he has collaborated with various artists, and formed the duo Toheart with Woohyun of Infinite. He made his debut as a soloist in November 2018 with the release of the digital single "Forever Yours", and his first studio album, Face, was released later that month. His second album, Gasoline, was released in 2022. Key has also contributed to songwriting for himself and Shinee.

As an actor, he was cast in multiple musicals, such as Bonnie & Clyde (2013), Zorro (2014), and Chess (2015). He has since widened his field as an actor by taking part in several television drama roles, like Drinking Solo (2016) and The Guardians (2017).

In 2015, Key became active as a fashion designer and took part in numerous projects. For instance, he collaborated with Bridge Shop House to design Shinee concert outfits, and worked with model Irene Kim and the brand Charm's to design fashion apparel. Due to the success of his works, Key was later appointed as a fashion director for the group. Since 2020, he has gained prominence as a television personality, appearing on the variety shows DoReMi Market and I Live Alone as a cast member. He has received the Excellence Award from the MBC Entertainment Awards in recognition of his variety performances.
data.name: Key

data.biography: 金起範（김기범，Kim Ki Bum），藝名Key（키），韓國歌手、演員、服裝設計師和主持人，2008年以男子團體SHINee成員身分出道。
data.name: Key
